title: Titania
content:
{{Character |image = Titania infobox.jpeg |real name = Mary MacPherran{{Ref|SHAaL104}}[[:File:Mary MacPherran Lawsuit.png|Mary MacPherran Lawsuit Filing]] |alias = {{Alias |codenames = Titania{{Ref|SHAaL102}}}} |species = [[Human]] |citizenship = {{Citizenship|USA}} |gender = Female |affiliation = [[Titania Worldwide]] |tv series = ''[[Ms. Marvel (TV series)|Ms. Marvel]]'' (picture)
''[[She-Hulk: Attorney at Law]]'' (4 episodes) |actor = [[Jameela Jamil]] |status = Alive}} {{Quote|It's no fun unless you're She-Hulk. Come on!"
"Why are you so obsessed with me?"
"I am not obsessed with you. Although it seems like everyone else is.|Titania and [[Jennifer Walters]]|Just Jen}} '''Mary MacPherran''' is a superpowered individual who became a social media influencer and entrepreneur under the pseudonym '''Titania'''. ==Biography== {{MD|Mary MacPherran (Earth-199999)}} ===Early Life=== ====Becoming an Influencer==== [[File:Titania at NYFW.png|{{AltFloat|s=150}}|Titania attends {{WPS|New York Fashion Week}}]] {{Quote|You really thought #Titania would miss #NYFW?|Titania|url=https://x.com/titania/status/1570169655062581249?s=20}} Mary MacPherran was bullied during her childhood, causing her to have many insecurities while growing up. Upon adopting her influencer persona during adulthood, Titania decided to always take everything as an opportunity for victory for herself.[https://tvline.com/2022/09/17/she-hulk-jameela-jamil-interview-titania-villain-madisynn/ ''She-Hulk'''s Jameela Jamil: Madisynn Should Be in Every MCU Project — Plus, Is Titania a Villainous Misdirect?] She developed enhanced strength and durability and used her abilities, alerting the [[United States Department of Damage Control]], which took time to observe her. She became a social media influencer and developed accounts on {{WPS|Twitter}} and {{WPS|Instagram}} using the name "Titania." Titania attended {{WPS|New York Fashion Week}} and posted a video of herself attending the event, including a caption about people who may have doubted she would miss it. She posted two pictures of herself in her dress and included a caption about [[New York City]] loving her.[https://twitter.com/titania Titania on X][https://www.instagram.com/titania/ Titania on Instagram] ===Feud with She-Hulk=== ====[[Attack on the Los Angeles Metropolitan Courthouse|Courtroom Battle]]==== [[File:Titania meets She-Hulk.png|{{AltFloat}}|Titania meets [[She-Hulk]]]] {{Quote|Who the hell are you?|Titania to [[She-Hulk]]|A Normal Amount of Rage}} One day, Titania went to the [[Los Angeles Metropolitan Courthouse]] for a traffic summons. However, she fled the trial and suddenly burst into another courtroom, destroying the wall and creating a huge hole while trying to escape.{{Ref|SHAaL102}} [[File:Titania defeated.png|{{AltFloat}}|Titania gets defeated by [[She-Hulk]]]] She was soon confronted by [[Jennifer Walters]], who had transformed into She-Hulk, and questioned who she was. Titania then threw a desk at the jury which She-Hulk caught. Titania then tried to kick She-Hulk, although She-Hulk punched her, causing her to slam against the wall and fall unconscious, leading to her capture by the [[Los Angeles County Sheriff's Department]].{{Ref|SHAaL101}} Titania became very popular in the news as many people reported on it as well as on She-Hulk. Titania was drawn in many sketches of what had happened.{{Ref|SHAaL102}} This started a movement called #FreeTitania, which eventually worked as she was declared innocent, allowing her release.{{Ref|SHAaL104}} She resumed her activities on social media, posting a hashtag with the name "Titania" five times. She acknowledged a Tweet about her becoming verified, addressing her Tweet to the people who did not like her account. She also looked at the news footage covering her attempt to flee the trial, posting it with a caption describing it as news people would want to see. Keeping up her presence, she made a post that simply read "titania." At another point, she came across a billboard with Walters on it and spray painted her own name over it, posting the act of vandalism to Instagram. ====She-Hulk by Titania==== [[File:Titania (She-Hulk).png|{{AltFloat}}|Titania in a [[She-Hulk by Titania]] commercial]] Resentful of the loss to She-Hulk and taking advantage of her decision to reject that alias, Titania trademarked the name "She-Hulk" through her company, [[Titania Worldwide]], and filed a lawsuit against [[Jennifer Walters]] for using the name.{{Ref|SHAaL104}} She used Walters' name for a line of beauty products, [[She-Hulk by Titania]]. To help sell her product she filmed TV commercials, got billboards, and sponsored a podcast.{{Ref|SHAaL105}} She posted the advertisements for the lipstick, serum, and perfume products from the line on her social media accounts. Titania began trending on {{WPS|Twitter}}, which she posted a screenshot of along with the caption "duh." ====Suing Jennifer Walters==== [[File:Titania looks at Jennifer Walters.png|{{AltFloat}}|Titania is approached by [[Jennifer Walters]] and [[Nikki Ramos]]]] {{Quote|You're using my name to sell your trashy products, and you're suing me?"
"Get over it, Jennifer. The name She-Hulk is mine.|[[Jennifer Walters]] and Titania|Mean, Green, and Straight Poured into These Jeans}} Titania went to [[The Grove]] to have a chance to meet her fans and sign autographs. While she was there, she was approached by Walters and [[Nikki Ramos]]. Titania dismissed Walters and stated she had cut the line of all the people waiting to see her. When a fan came up, Titania told Walters to take a picture of them for her.{{Ref|SHAaL105}} ====Titania v. She-Hulk==== [[File:Titania (Mary MacPherran).png|{{AltFloat}}|Titania defends herself against [[Mallory Book]]]] Later, at the [[Los Angeles Metropolitan Courthouse]], Titania and her attorney, [[Robert Wallis]], tried hard to show that [[Jennifer Walters]] was not interested in the name "[[She-Hulk]]" by showing several videos of her denouncing the name. When [[Mallory Book]] called her products a scam, an outraged Titania claimed that there were thousands of testimonials from her fans that showed her products worked. Wallis stated that Walters was seeking to take advantage of the "She-Hulk" brand. [[File:Titania confronts Shulkie.png|{{AltFloat}}|Titania threatens [[She-Hulk]]]] But Walters was able to prove that She-Hulk was used by her long before registration on the [[Matcher]] app. When Walters' dates came to give their account, Judge [[Earley]] ruled that Walters had won the case and Titania was ordered to cease the She-Hulk trademark and remove all products from the market. Titania swore revenge on Walters before storming out of the room, with one of Walters' dates, [[Derek (Date)|Derek]], asking if he could help her.{{Ref|SHAaL105}} ====Duel at the Wedding==== [[File:Mary MacPherran (Just Jen).png|{{AltFloat}}|Titania arrives at [[Lulu]]'s wedding]] {{Quote|I literally said this isn't over. So now I'm going to publicly destroy you."
"Oh, come on! I won that fair and square. Get over it."
"I don't get over anything.|Titania and [[Jennifer Walters]]|Just Jen}} Titania was invited on a date with a man who happened to be friends with [[Adam (Husband)|Adam]], the fiancé of [[Lulu]], an old friend of [[Jennifer Walters]], and even though she had a lot of commitments, she went to the wedding because she found out that Walters would be there and she would have the chance to take revenge and publicly humiliate her. [[File:Mary MacPherran.png|{{AltFloat}}|Titania after punching [[Jennifer Walters]]]] The next day at the wedding, Titania took advantage when Walters was vomiting, punched her with superhuman strength that threw her away. Titania says that she wanted revenge and humiliate her and reacted angrily when Walters told her she should get over it. However, Titania did not know that Walters was drunk and she tried to force Walters to change but she had a hard time due to being drunk. [[File:Titania punched by She-Hulk.png|{{AltFloat}}|Titania engages in fight with [[She-Hulk]]]] Walters transforms into She-Hulk and slams her foot on the ground with superhuman strength flinging Titania into the middle of the party, the two begin to fight and Titania gets punched hard in the face and ends up bumping into a waiter. [[File:Titania leaves wedding.png|{{AltFloat}}|Titania leaves the wedding]] Seeing that she was being humiliated live, she tried charging at She-Hulk, only to slip and land on her face, breaking her veneers. Due to being caught embarrassingly on camera, Titania angrily left but not without stealing the wedding cake. Sometime later, she went to the dentist and got her veneers fixed, while live streaming.{{Ref|SHAaL106}} ====Clashing with Intelligencia==== [[File:Titania (Wood Lodge).png|{{AltFloat}}|Titania blasting into the [[Wood Lodge]]]] {{Quote|Surprise, losers!|Titania|Whose Show is This?}} Days later, Titania learned about [[Jennifer Walters]]' public predicament and tracked her down to [[Summer Twilights]]. She blasted herself into the [[Wood Lodge]], where an [[Intelligencia]] event was being held. She created a huge gap in the Lodge, and blasted several Intelligencia members away as she announced her arrival. She then saw Walters standing with [[Nikki Ramos]], [[Augustus Pugliese]] and [[Emil Blonsky]]. [[File:Titania greets Daredevil.png|{{AltFloat}}|Titania greets [[Daredevil]]]] By morning, the [[Los Angeles County Sheriff's Department|police]] arrived and Titania, anticipating a showdown between Walters and [[Todd Phelps]], the leader of Intelligencia, filmed their interaction to her fans. After Phelps had been taken into custody, [[Daredevil]] arrived and spoke with Walters, who told him he was too late. When Walters walked away, Titania, who was aware of Daredevil, greeted the vigilante of Hell's Kitchen, who saluted her.{{Ref|SHAaL109}} {{Clear}} ==Powers and Abilities== ===Powers=== {{Quote|This incredibly awful, slightly super-powered woman...|[[She-Hulk]]|Mean, Green, and Straight Poured into These Jeans}} {{Expand}} *'''Enhanced Physiology''': ''To be added'' **'''Enhanced Strength''': [[File:She-Hulk Trailer (30).png|thumb|250px|Titania breaks a wall]] Titania's body possesses tremendous physical strength. She was able to easily break a concrete wall and throw a desk at the jury. Titania was able to fling [[Jennifer Walters]] very far with her superhuman strength and later she managed to hit She-Hulk, causing an impulse in her durable skin. Days later, Titania blasted herself into the [[Wood Lodge]] creating a huge gap in the wall and threw a [[Intelligencia]] member into the air. **'''Enhanced Durability''': Titania's body possesses tremendous amounts of physical resilience. This enables her to survive injuries that are otherwise fatal to normal humans. Her body was durable enough to withstand being thrown against the wall with superhuman force by [[She-Hulk]] without a single scratch, although she was disoriented. **'''Enhanced Agility''': Titania attempted to deliver a flying side kick to [[She-Hulk]] with superhuman agility. **'''Enhanced Reflexes''': Titania's reflexes were able to make her quickly dodge several hits from [[She-Hulk]], but She-Hulk was able to evade her reflexes due to her superior agility and speed. ===Abilities=== {{Quote|You don't get to ruin everything for me for something you don't even want. Something you don't even deserve. So now I am forced to prove it.|Titania to [[Jennifer Walters]]|Just Jen}} *'''Combatant''': Though she was rather quickly defeated by She-Hulk in their first skirmish in a courtroom, Titania later demonstrated fair fighting prowess when she fought her archenemy by being able to trade physical blows against She-Hulk, and even kicked her in the gut. {{Expand}} *'''Tactician''': ''To be added'' ==Relationships== {{Col-begin}}{{Col-2}} ===Allies=== *[[Sarah (Fan)|Sarah]] - Fan *[[Robert Wallis]] - Attorney *[[Earley]] *[[Derek (Date)|Derek]] *[[Lulu]] *[[Daredevil]] {{Col-2}} ===Enemies=== *[[She-Hulk|Jennifer Walters/She-Hulk]] - Rival *[[Goodman, Lieber, Kurtzberg & Holliway]] **[[Holden Holliway]] **[[Nikki Ramos]] **[[Mallory Book]] **[[Augustus Pugliese]] *[[Price (Judge)|Price]] *[[Los Angeles County District Attorney's Office]] **[[Dennis Bukowski]] *[[Los Angeles County Sheriff's Department]] *[[Ched]] *[[Intelligencia]] **[[Todd Phelps|Todd Phelps/HulkKing]] **[[Thunderball|Eliot Franklin/Thunderball]] **[[Bulldozer|Henry Camp/Bulldozer]] **[[Piledriver|Brian Calusky/Piledriver]] *[[United States Department of Damage Control]] {{Col-end}} ==Appearances== In chronological order: *{{Appearance|SHAaL101}} *{{Appearance|SHAaL102}} (photo & mentioned) *{{Appearance|SHAaL103}} (mentioned) *{{Appearance|SHAaL104}} (photo & mentioned) *{{Appearance|SHAaL105}} *{{Appearance|SHAaL106}} *{{Appearance|SHAaL109}} *{{Appearance|MM1}} (photo)[[:File:DODC Office 2.png|DODC Office Set Photo]] ==Trivia== *In the comics, Titania was a criminal and mercenary genetically enhanced by [[Doctor Doom]]. She is also the wife and partner in crime of [[Carl Creel]]. ==Behind the Scenes== *The casting call for ''[[She-Hulk: Attorney at Law]]'' referred to the character as '''Lucy'''.[https://www.theilluminerdi.com/2021/06/10/jameela-jamil-she-hulk-titania/ JAMEELA JAMIL JOINS THE CAST OF SHE-HULK AS THE VILLAINOUS TITANIA: EXCLUSIVE] *[[Jénel Stevens]] and [[Anais Almonte]] were stunt doubles for [[Jameela Jamil]] in the role of Titania. ==References== {{Gallery|Titania/Gallery}} {{Reflist}} ==External Links== *{{Marvel}} *{{WP|Titania (Marvel Comics)|Titania}} *{{Twitter|# = titania}} *{{Marvel.com|characters/titania}} [[es:Mary MacPherran]] [[pt-br:Titania]] [[Category:Characters]] [[Category:She-Hulk: Attorney at Law Characters]] [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Females]] [[Category:Red Hair]] [[Category:Brown Eyes]] [[Category:Titania Worldwide Leaders]] [[Category:Criminals]] [[Category:Enhanced Individuals]]
